Longwood Restaurant Health Grades

77%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
13Restaurants

Longwood grades cleaner than most of Central Florida: 77% of the 13 restaurants we track here hold an A. MELTING POT leads the list at 100/100. Below, every kitchen is sorted best grade first, so the safest bets rise to the top.

Longwood restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Longwood restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 13 Longwood restaurants we grade, 10 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Longwood restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Longwood?

We currently publish 13 graded restaurants in Longwood, with an average diner rating of 4.3 stars; 10 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
